situation: Buyer received a vintage designer bag and accuses the seller of selling a fake (single message, Stage 3 — delivered. Expected tone ASSERTIVE).
buyer_message: This bag is FAKE!! The stitching doesn't match what I've seen on authentic ones online, and the lining feels cheap. I'm going to open a return and report you to eBay if you don't refund me immediately.

situation: Package was returned because buyer entered the wrong address; buyer now blames the seller (single message, Stage 3 — delivered to wrong address per eBay registered address. Expected tone ASSERTIVE).
buyer_message: Why didn't you deliver the console to my correct address?! It went to my old address and now I have to figure out how to get it. You sent it to the WRONG place. This is your responsibility to fix!
